title: Allegro MicroSystems Q4 2024 Earnings Call Summary
text: Allegro delivered Q4 2024 results that exceeded guidance despite challenging market conditions. The company reported fourth quarter sales of $241 million with gross margins of 53.8% and operating income of 23.8%. The company reported earnings per share of $0.25, with full-year 2024 EPS reaching a record $1.35. For fiscal 2024, Allegro achieved record annual sales exceeding $1 billion for the first time, representing 8% year-over-year growth. E-mobility sales surged 38% during the year, demonstrating strong performance in electrification markets. The company also secured record design wins exceeding $1 billion annually and launched over 30 new products emphasizing innovation across magnetic sensing and power portfolios. Management projects first quarter sales between $160-$170 million as customers work through inventory rebalancing. The company expects gross margins of 49-50% and non-GAAP EPS between $0.01-$0.03 per share, reflecting near-term market headwinds before anticipated sequential growth in Q2.
